<!-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank you for contributing to the PrestaShop Skills project!

Please take the time to edit the "Answers" rows below with the necessary information.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------>

| Questions          | Answers |
| ------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Description?       | Please be specific when describing the PR. <br> Are you adding a new skill, updating documentation, or modifying the repository structure? Every detail helps.
| Type?              | new skill / update skill / documentation / tooling / other
| Domain / Category? | e.g., `autoupgrade` / `user` (if applicable)
| How to test?       | Indicate how to verify that this change works as expected (e.g., provide a prompt example you used to test the skill with your AI assistant).
| Fixed issue?       | Fixes #{issue number here}
| Related PRs        | If this skill relates to a specific feature or module change in PrestaShop, provide a link to related PRs here.
| Sponsor company    | Your company or customer's name goes here (if applicable).
